title: Test Your Agent
lede: Try your Smart Agent before it goes live. Talk to it right in the browser with Test Agent, or place a real phone call to hear it end-to-end.

steps.title: Open Test Agent
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open the agent you want to test.
  2. Click the Test Agent button at the top of the editor to reveal the test panel.

images.caption: The Test Agent panel connects you to a live in-browser conversation.
The Test Agent panel connects you to a live in-browser conversation.

steps.title: Talk to the Agent in the Browser
steps.content:
1. Click Connect and allow microphone access if prompted.
  2. Start speaking. Confirm the greeting, prompt, voice, and any tools behave as expected.
  3. Edit the agent and reconnect to try changes instantly - no phone required.

images.caption: Testing the agent directly in the browser.
Testing the agent directly in the browser.

steps.title: Test With a Real Phone Call
steps.content:
1. Use the phone/dial control in the header to place an outbound test call.
  2. Choose the phone number to call from and select the agent to test.
  3. Enter your own number, start the call, and have a full conversation to verify real-world telephony behavior.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: Once your agent passes testing, take it further:

cards.title: Add Tools
cards.description: Enable actions like ending calls and booking appointments.

cards.title: Add a Knowledge Base
cards.description: Give your agent documents and FAQs to answer from.

cards.title: Embed on Your Website
cards.description: Publish the agent as a chat/voice widget on your site.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials

metaDescription: Test your iMash Smart Agent before launch: talk to it live in the browser with Test Agent, or place a real phone call to verify voice, prompt, and tools.
